name: airesearchorchestrator
description: Five-phase AI research workflow orchestration — from idea through paper with Survey, Pilot, Experiments, Paper Writing, and Reflection phases with explicit human gates

metadata.description: Turn a research IDEA into a controlled five-phase project with fixed directories, scored gate checks, visible progress artifacts, and explicit human approval between phases

plugins.name: airesearchorchestrator
plugins.description: Initialize and run a gated five-phase AI research project from idea through paper. Includes 40+ skills for literature survey, pilot validation, experiments, paper writing, and reflection.
